fields.name: Eiffel Tower
fields.description: Iconic iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars, a global cultural icon of France.

fields.name: Louvre Museum
fields.description: World's largest art museum and a historic monument in Paris.

fields.name: Le Marais Food Tour
fields.description: Explore the historic Le Marais district through its culinary delights.

fields.name: Bois de Boulogne
fields.description: Large public park located along the western edge of Paris.

fields.name: Colosseum
fields.description: Ancient amphitheater in the center of Rome, the largest ever built.

fields.name: Trastevere Food Walk
fields.description: Discover authentic Roman cuisine in the charming Trastevere neighborhood.

fields.name: Villa Borghese Gardens
fields.description: Large landscape garden in the naturalistic English manner in Rome.

fields.name: Mount Fuji
fields.description: Japan's tallest peak and an iconic symbol of the country.

fields.name: Tsukiji Outer Market
fields.description: Famous fish market offering fresh seafood and Japanese street food.

fields.name: Senso-ji Temple
fields.description: Ancient Buddhist temple in the Asakusa district, Tokyo's oldest temple.

fields.name: Central Park
fields.description: Urban park in Manhattan, one of the most visited attractions in the world.

fields.name: Metropolitan Museum of Art
fields.description: Largest art museum in the Americas with an encyclopedic collection.

fields.name: Chelsea Market
fields.description: Food hall and shopping mall in the Meatpacking District.

fields.name: Rock Climbing at Joshua Tree
fields.description: World-class rock climbing destination near Los Angeles.

fields.name: Santorini Beach Resorts
fields.description: Luxurious beach resorts with stunning caldera views.

fields.name: Swiss Alps Hiking
fields.description: Breathtaking hiking trails through the Swiss Alps.

fields.name: Bali Spa Retreat
fields.description: Traditional Balinese spa treatments and wellness retreats.

fields.name: Amazon Rainforest Expedition
fields.description: Guided expeditions through the world's largest rainforest.

fields.name: Great Barrier Reef Diving
fields.description: World-famous diving and snorkeling at the Great Barrier Reef.

fields.name: Kerala Backwaters
fields.description: Serene houseboat cruises through Kerala's network of backwater canals.
